DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JOHN MARK EDWARD BOUZANE, INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING AS FAST EVICTION SERVICES, BOUZANE, JOHN MARK EDWARD (SUED AS THE LAW OFFICES JOHN E. THE COURT CONTINUED THIS MATTER FROM OCTOBER 16, 2012 WITH A REQUEST THAT MOVING PARTY PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES, BUT THE COURT STILL HAS NOT RECEIVED ANY COURTESY COPIES. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOHN MARK EDWARD BOUZANE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Off calendar per stipulation and order staying case entered on October 23, 2012. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Request To Produce Documents; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Oct-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT JOHN MARK EDWARD BOUZANE, INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING AS FAST EVICTION SERVICES, BOUZANE, JOHN MARK EDWARD (SUED AS THE LAW OFFICES JOHN E. BOUZANE AND JOHN EDWARD MARK BOUZANE) Motion To Compel Responses To Request To Produce Documents is DENIED. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The Court continued this matter from October 16, 2012 with a request that moving party provide courtesy copies, but the Court still has not received any courtesy copies. Prevailing party to prepare the order. Katherine Huibonhoa, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

DEFENDANT JOHN MARK EDWARD BOUZANE, INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING, BOUZANE, JOHN MARK EDWARD'S Motion To Compel Responses To Request To Produce Documents is continued on the court's own motion to October 26, 2012 at 9:00 am. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and is ordered to provide courtesy copies to Department 302 no later than October 16, 2012 at 4:00 pm. Katherine Huibonhoa, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
